item.title: Creating a homelab
item.author: gabriel.aleks19@gmail.com (Gabriel Aleks)
item.description: Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.

item.title: About
item.author: gabriel.aleks19@gmail.com (Gabriel Aleks)
item.description:
Hello there :)

My name is Gabriel Aleksandravicius and I am a Brazilian-Lithuanian software developer with 6 years of professional experience in building web and embedded applications. I am currently based in Biel/Bienne, in Switzerland. I speak Portuguese, English, French and a teeny tiny bit of German - I’m especially proficient at saying “grüezi 👋” on hikes and at apologizing to old folks at the supermarket and asking to speak french instead.
